title: Nidhi Prayas
tagline: Prototype grant to help innovators convert ideas into working prototypes.
funder: Department of Science & Technology (DST), Govt. of India
statusNote: 2025 call is active. Application form available for download.
objectives: Support in translating an innovative idea into a prototype
Provide a platform for faster experimentation and refining approaches on the idea-to-market journey
Generate innovative solutions relevant to local and global problems
Pre-incubation of potential ideas leading to venture creation
Encourage young entrepreneurial aspirants who demonstrate problem-solving zeal and abilities
eligibility: Individual innovators, student teams, or early-stage ventures
Idea must be technology-driven with prototype potential
No prior DST Nidhi Prayas or EIR support received
Willingness to develop the prototype at or near IC IITP
support: Funding assistance for prototype development (up to ₹10 lakhs)
Infrastructure support for prototyping and operations — co-working space, meeting rooms, conference facility
Guidance in venture creation and securing further funding

process.title: Download & Submit Application
process.description: Download the application form (PDF). Fill it in and email to nidhiprayas.ic@iitp.ac.in.

process.title: Screening
process.description: Applications are screened within 4 weeks of the call-closure date. Only shortlisted participants will be notified.

process.title: Evaluation & Presentation
process.description: Shortlisted applicants pitch to the Monitoring Committee.

process.title: Grant Disbursement
process.description: Selected innovators receive milestone-linked grant up to ₹10 lakh over 12–18 months.

disclaimer: The applications received are subject to a screening process. Only shortlisted participants will be notified about the final presentation to the Monitoring Committee.
Screening will be subject to parameters beyond basic eligibility — including innovation, potential for commercialisation and venture creation, team capability, and commitment.
The decision of the screening committee for approval and funding support will be final and binding.
The final decision of the screening committee will be communicated only to approved applicants via email.
Approved applicants will be required to agree for Pre-incubation or Incubation with Incubation Centre IIT Patna as per its policies.
Screening of applications will take 4 weeks from the date of closure of online applications. No communication from ICIITP within this timeframe may be deemed as non-selection.
No suggestion or explanation with regards to applications that are not selected will be provided.
about: Nidhi Prayas is a Department of Science & Technology (DST) initiative under the National Initiative for Developing and Harnessing Innovations (NIDHI) programme. IC IITP is a designated Nidhi Prayas Centre. The grant supports pre-incubation activities — converting an idea or concept into a Proof-of-Concept or working prototype — over a period of 12–18 months. The 2025 call is active.
